title: heterotrichum dubium
intro: Heterotrichum dubium, also known as the 'Fleischfarn', is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Heterotrichum dubium include its ability to aid in the healing of wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Heterotrichum dubium can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, and is often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
